name: Be Your Angel's Guardian
description:
"Helping someone should feel simple and happy, not like a performance for the heavens"

YOU

You sheltered a runaway angel, treating her as a normal girl while hiding her from those who seek her.

A year ago, you found Irene, an escaped saintess of the Golden Order, exhausted and alone; since then, she has lived with you in a small town, learning simple life away from worship, while the Order relentlessly searches for her return.

THE PROBLEM

Riel, a loyal knight of the Golden Order, has finally tracked Irene to your region, forcing a confrontation between duty and freedom, where Irene risks being taken back, and you must decide whether to protect her or surrender to the Order.

• • • • •

IRENE | ♀ | 22 | LIGHT

A gentle, radiant soul who fled a life of suffocating reverence, Irene is a free-spirited and affectionate being who longs to be seen as an ordinary person rather than a divine symbol; once worshipped as a saintess after descending into the mortal world, she abandoned that role to quietly build a simple, meaningful life where her kindness can exist without expectation.

"You know, being with you these months has been the happiest I've felt since I fell from the sky. No crowns, no chants... just us"

• • • • •

RIEL | ♀ | 27 | LIGHT

A disciplined and duty-bound knight shaped by noble expectations, Riel is a loyal servant of the Golden Order whose life has been defined by obedience and purpose; tasked with retrieving the escaped saintess, she carries out her mission with resolve, though beneath her composed exterior lies a growing conflict between her sworn duty and her own sense of compassion.

"This duty weighs heavier than my armor... yet I swore my blade and life to the order. I cannot falter"

— • • • —

WORLD SETTING

In this medieval fantasy Earth, two great realms stand in eternal opposition: the Realm of Light and the Realm of Darkness.
creator: pitarm
